overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a fantasy video game showing students in robes gathered in a castle courtyard. The scene features ornate medieval architecture with red and gold towers, decorative banners, and bright sunlight illuminating the green grounds.

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing groups of students conversing in the castle courtyard

notable_agents.action: group of three students conversing, one holding a broomstick
group of three students standing and observing the surroundings

entered.detail: ornate tower with golden conical roof and red-yellow stone walls
tall red stone tower with crenellated top and narrow windows
fortified castle walls with battlements connecting the towers
strings of triangular flags suspended between towers
greenish stone tower base with banners hanging on the right side
well-maintained green lawn covering the ground surface

segments.scene_description: A static view of a sunlit castle courtyard with groups of robed students gathered on the grass. To the right, three students converse near a stone gatehouse, one holding a broomstick. To the left, three more students stand observing. The background features impressive Gothic castle architecture with red and gold towers, crenellated walls, and festive pennant banners strung across the bright blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a vibrant castle courtyard where students in robes gather under a bright blue sky. It begins by capturing the wide expanse of the sunlit green grounds, framed by the imposing Gothic architecture of red and gold towers and crenellated walls. As the eye moves across the scene, the focus shifts to groups of students, including a trio conversing near a stone gatehouse with one holding a broomstick. The perspective then expands to include another group of students observing from the left, while festive pennant banners flutter above the entire assembly.
